title: May 16
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}
'''May 16''' is the 136th day of the year (137th in leap years). There are 229 days remaining.

[[File:Attack-Clones-Poster.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']] was released on May 16, 2002.]]</noinclude>
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Ramon Tikaram]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Khary Payton]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Adam Rex]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 64|''Star Wars Weekly'' 64]] published.
*[[1982]] – [[Tiya Sircar]] is born.
*[[1990]] – [[Thomas Brodie-Sangster]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 48|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 48]] published.
*[[1995]] – [[Droids (1995) 2|''Droids '' 2]] published.
*[[1999]] – Twelve cities host charity premieres for [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']].
*[[2001]] – [[Jedi vs. Sith 2|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 2]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|'''''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones''''']] released worldwide.
*2002 – ''[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 56]]'' published
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars: Journey Through Space (2005)|''Star Wars: Journey Through Space'']] published.
*2005 – [[Star Wars: What is a Wookiee? (2005)|''Star Wars: What is a Wookiee?'']] published.
*[[2007]] – ''[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection Volume 3: Darth Maul]]'' published.
*2007 – ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic Volume 2: Flashpoint]]'' published.
*2007 – [[Rebellion 6|''Rebellion'' 6]] published.
*[[2012]] – [[Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm 4|''Dawn of the Jedi: Force Storm'' 4]] published.
*[[2014]] – Production begins on [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'']] at London's [[Pinewood Studios]].
*[[2018]] – [[Poe Dameron 27|''Poe Dameron'' 27]] published.
*2018 – ''[[Star Wars Battlefront II]]''{{'s}} [[Han Solo]] Season begins.
*[[2023]] – [[Brotherhood (novel)|''Brotherhood'']] reprinted in paperback.
*[[2025]] – "[[A Mission to Remember / The Bounty Hunter and the Thief]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
